column1: Gordon? I think he_______________(write) a letter at the moment.
Yes, the match is on TV now, but we_______________(lose).
Right now, Margaret______________(have) a shower. Do you want to ring later?
Sally_______________(stay) with her aunt for a few days.
I____________(lie)! It's true! I did see Madonna at the supermarket.
We_____________(have) lunch, but I can come round and help you later.
___________________(you/play) music up there? It's really noisy!
